## Location

**Book:** (1: Understanding / 2: Protecting / 3: Governing)
**Chapter/Section:** (e.g., ch-12.2)
**Line or paragraph:** (quote or describe the location)

## Claim Needing Citation

> Paste the claim or statistic here

## Why It Needs a Source

- [ ] Statistical claim without attribution
- [ ] Quote without speaker/source
- [ ] Specific incident details without reference
- [ ] Tool/framework claim that should link to docs
- [ ] Other: ___

## Suggested Source (if known)

If you know of a good source for this claim, link it here.
